Verified zero callers via rg '\.schema\.(parse|safeParse)' src/. Mechanical refactor. title: DWL-T3: SessionReader expansion — Cursor + Copilot + Windsurf
description: M/P2 — Pillar 5 vision says wiki feeds from harvest; only claude-code + codex-cli (2/13 adapters) implement SessionReader. Closes the loudest vision-reality gap. Per adapter: src/adapters/<name>/session.ts (NEW, ~150 LOC) implementing createXxxSessionReader(): SessionReader + wire into <name>/index.ts via sessionReader: createXxxSessionReader(). Cursor session storage: ~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/History (macOS), ~/.config/Cursor/User/History (linux). Copilot: VS Code chat history under workspaceStorage. Windsurf: ~/.windsurf/history or similar — research first. Files: src/adapters/{cursor,copilot,windsurf}/session.ts (NEW), src/adapters/{cursor,copilot,windsurf}/index.ts (modify), test/adapters/{cursor,copilot,windsurf}/session.test.ts (NEW). NO file overlap between three adapters — full parallel. Acceptance: am session list now shows entries from 5/13 adapters; new tests pass. Depends on T2 to land first to avoid index.ts conflicts.
closeReason: Deferred — needs external research on Cursor/Copilot/Windsurf session storage paths per platform (macOS, Linux, Windows). Headless ov sling spawn unreliable in this WSL2 env (verified). Reopen in a dedicated session with working research spawn.

title: DWL-T4: Wave T follow-ups (ADR-0047 close-out)
description: M/P2 — Wave T (commit 9d46f73) shipped pair-accept + pair-finalize but deferred 3 items per ADR-0047 spec: (1) auto-detect surface — 'am pair finalize' with NO positional, scans recipients/ for new .pub files since last finalize, requires git pull integration. (2) [age].recipients TOML round-trip — recipient set source-of-truth currently lives in recipients/ directory; ADR-0047 says it should also live in .am-secrets.toml [age].recipients array, and finalize should append to it. (3) am pair add deprecation alias — old verb name, route to accept with deprecation warning. Files: src/commands/pair-finalize.ts (auto-detect mode), src/core/secrets-age.ts (TOML recipients sync), src/core/git.ts (pull/push helper if missing), src/commands/pair.ts (alias wiring), test/commands/pair-finalize-autodetect.test.ts (NEW). Acceptance: am pair finalize (no args) detects new pubs; recipients toml round-trips; existing 19 pair tests still pass.
closeReason: T4 merged on main. Two commits: 186a79f (am pair add deprecation alias) + 06907b8 merge, and 21bff15 (autodetect finalize + .am-secrets.toml round-trip + bestEffortPull) + 155ae65 merge. All three ADR-0047 deferred sub-items closed. Tests 2906→2924 (+18). New module: src/core/secrets-toml.ts. New helper: bestEffortPull in src/core/git.ts.

title: DWL-T5: Marketplace v1 sunset — write removal-target ADR-0052
description: S/P3 — ADR-0039 (accepted 2026-05-05) retired Marketplace v1 as a pillar but kept code wired with deprecation warnings. NO removal-target ADR exists. Code under src/marketplace/ is ~1500 LOC; src/commands/marketplace.ts wires CLI; src/cli.ts:59 registers it. Decision needed: when do we delete it? This task: write ADR-0052 'Marketplace v1 Code Removal Target' as proposed status. Should specify: removal version (e.g. v0.6.0), grace-period commits, deprecation warning text, what happens to git-vendored bundles users may already have. NOT this task: actual deletion. Acceptance: ADR-0052 in proposed state with a migration sketch and removal-version commitment.
closeReason: T5 merged on main as d8326e9 + 5f3d3aa. ADR-0052 (proposed) Marketplace v1 code removal target written, 282 lines, MADR 3.0 format. Awaits user ratification to promote to accepted.

Move readActiveProfile into src/core/config.ts (or src/core/state.ts new); move extractServerIdentity into src/core/identity.ts (new) and re-export from import.ts for compatibility. title: DWL-T9: AM_APPLY_BACKUP integration with am doctor + pruning
description: S/P2 — Engine scout (independent audit) flagged the recovery gap: AM_APPLY_BACKUP=1 enables per-apply backups but there is no pruning logic and am doctor doesn't surface the backup state. Files: src/commands/doctor.ts (add 'Apply backups' check), src/commands/apply.ts (add prune-on-apply if env set), src/core/apply-backup.ts (NEW — list/prune helper module), test/core/apply-backup.test.ts (NEW). Acceptance: am doctor reports backup count + total size when AM_APPLY_BACKUP set; apply prunes backups older than 30 days OR keeps last N (configurable via AM_APPLY_BACKUP_MAX); existing tests still pass; new tests cover prune logic.
closeReason: T9 merged on main as 5ea57ab + 00f4bea. New module src/core/apply-backup.ts (listAllBackups + getBackupStats + pruneBackups). am doctor now reports backup count + size. am apply best-effort prunes after live apply (default maxAgeDays=30, maxCount=10). 13 new tests.

Acceptance: am wiki resolve interactively picks local/remote/edit per file via @clack/prompts; am wiki relink merges newer files from orphan dir → central, then symlinks; existing wiki tests pass.
closeReason: T10 merged on main as f4330e9 + ea377b3 (reduced scope after lead-wiki readiness probe). am wiki resolve was already shipped in commit 6dfe8db (2026-05-03); am wiki relink obsolete under ADR-0044. Added 238-line command-level test test/commands/wiki-resolve.test.ts covering 5 scenarios; updated docs/plans/wiki-sync-m5.md frontmatter.

title: DWL-T11 (post-Phase-8): wire AM_APPLY_BACKUP_MAX_AGE env var
description: XS/P4 — Phase-8 review of T9 (commit 5ea57ab) found that the dispatch specified honoring AM_APPLY_BACKUP_MAX_AGE env var (in addition to AM_APPLY_BACKUP_MAX which IS wired at src/core/apply-backup.ts:139). Builder shipped only the count env, not the age env. Currently maxAgeDays is hard-coded at 30 via DEFAULT_MAX_AGE_DAYS. Users can configure count but not age. Add envMaxAgeDays() helper paralleling envMaxCount(); call sites in src/commands/apply.ts:161 should pass {maxCount: envMaxCount(), maxAgeDays: envMaxAgeDays()}. Add 2-3 tests covering env parse + parse-failure fallback + integer-validation. Files: src/core/apply-backup.ts, src/commands/apply.ts (1 line), test/core/apply-backup.test.ts.
closeReason: T11 merged. AM_APPLY_BACKUP_MAX_AGE env var now honored in src/core/apply-backup.ts; envMaxAgeDays() helper parallels envMaxCount(); 4 new tests cover env-set/missing/malformed/negative cases.

These have related downstream ADRs already 'accepted' (0048/0049/0050/0051) which amend them. title: DWL-T16: Add Windows path support to EXTENSION_DIRS marketplace-vscode.ts
description: S/Windows — windows-ci-rebaseline.md hazard #1: src/adapters/shared/marketplace-vscode.ts EXTENSION_DIRS has only {darwin, linux} — no win32. Falls back to linux on Windows. Adds %APPDATA%\\Code\\User\\extensions etc. for vscode + cursor + kiro + windsurf. Affects copilot/cursor/kiro/windsurf when run on Windows. Files: src/adapters/shared/marketplace-vscode.ts. Acceptance: all 4 EXTENSION_DIRS entries have a win32 path; getExtensionsDir resolves win32 correctly; tests added or extended that mock platform=win32 and verify the win32 path returned.

title: DWL-T17: Pillar 5 SessionReader for Cursor (with research)
description: M/research-needed — extend pillar 5 harvest from 2/13 to 3/13 adapters by adding SessionReader for Cursor. Research scope (use Tavily/Exa/Deepwiki): what does Cursor write to disk for chat/composer history? Common knowledge: ~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/workspaceStorage/<hash>/state.vscdb for SQLite-backed history; ~/.config/Cursor/... on Linux. Actual session content shape: conversation messages + role-tagged turns. Build: src/adapters/cursor/session.ts (NEW, ~150-200 LOC) implementing SessionReader interface — listSessions/loadSession/hasSessionStorage. Wire via cursor/index.ts. Test with fixture. Files: src/adapters/cursor/session.ts (new), src/adapters/cursor/index.ts (wire), test/adapters/cursor/session.test.ts (new). Acceptance: 3/13 adapters now feed harvest; new tests pass; existing 2924+ tests stay clean.

VS Code workspaceStorage globalStorage layout, copilot extension UID. Note: Copilot uses VS Code chat API which writes to extension globalStorage; the VS Code session storage path is ~/.config/Code/User/globalStorage/github.copilot-chat or similar. Build: src/adapters/copilot/session.ts (NEW). Disjoint from T17. Files: src/adapters/copilot/session.ts (new), src/adapters/copilot/index.ts (wire), test/adapters/copilot/session.test.ts (new). Depends on: nothing. Acceptance: 4/13 adapters feed harvest after this lands.
